case_title: ARTURO PAREDES VS. CANDY DARLING, CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAREDES, ARTURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANDY DARLING, CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $5,341.87 PRINCIPAL, $10.06 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,556.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PAREDES, ARTURO
